2. 你cancel或被cancel都無得留review
3. airbnb host會投訴某d review，而airbnb係傾向支持host
3. 集團式host會扮住客book自己既apartment，只需要付出少少airbnb service fee，就可以換到"完全真實"既好評

同埋講返第4點既做法
集團式host好撚醒，例如佢係airbnb上放2間房源
但事實上佢可能只係得1間房
所以airbnb到有1間房就係作為"review專用房源"，自己book自己住，用黎掃rating

Haffi
2017年1月 ·
Got cheated, the home we book and the home shown to us were (URL HIDDEN) booked one bed room and what we were shown was nothing but walkway in front of toilet door.he throw some old matress for us to sleep.there was some other family living in the bed room and once u come out of bedroom and while walking to toilet the place he asked me and my gf to stay.we refused and collected our money from him and had to book hotel at 10pm in d night in tokyo. We lost money due to this cheating host.Please do not book from this guy.Airbnb please take note.thanks

Got cheated, the home we book and the home shown to us were (URL HIDDEN) booked one bed room and what we were shown was nothing but walkway in front of toilet door.he throw some old matress for us to sleep.there was some other family living in the bed room and once u come out of bedroom and while walking to toilet the place he asked me and my gf to stay.we refused and collected our money from him and had to book hotel at 10pm in d night in tokyo. We lost money due to this cheating host.Please do not book from this guy.Airbnb please take note.thanks
